# Qualification Checklist

## Must Know
- Build type: new build or renovation
- Area
- Rough project size
- Timing

## Helpful But Not Mandatory
- Design preference
- Budget expectation
- Need for urgent installation
- Whether they are also comparing other suppliers

## Bucket Signals
- Fast-close: asks timing, asks process, responds quickly, wants survey soon.
- Price-sensitive: asks price early, wants comparison, gives little detail.
- Slow lead: vague scope, delayed replies, no timeline.

## Follow-up Cadence
- Day 1: send matched proof
- Day 3: ask if they want survey or quote support
- Day 7: send one practical tip or similar project
- Day 14: final soft-touch follow-up
